raw_consumer_statement: American Express is XXXX to XXXX customers and doesnt believe us or our evidence. The merchant for dispute XXXX literally provides them with the WRONG tracking number and they believed the merchant over me despite the fact the merchant gave me a prepaid return label with a whole different number and I showed American Express this before they shouldve seen that clearly. Anyway now I have to reopen dispute with them repeatedly until they understand and stop being XXXX. I have photo proof of the tracking number on the prepaid return label doesnt match what the merchant provided American Express for their evidence
